evidence.description: See the President's daily schedule, explore behind-the-scenes photos from inside the White House, and find out all the ways you can engage with the most interactive administration in our country's history.
evidence.text: Vice President Joe Biden and Georgia Governor Sonny Perdue tour Impulse Manufacturing with President Ronald Baysden and Plant Manager John Robert Densmore, in Dawsonville, Georgia
